body:
This PR improves the performance of column operations by:
 - Adding `@inline` and `@inbounds` annotations
 - Fixing some type inference issues that prevented inlining (in `idxin`)
title: Improve performance of column operators

body:
Precompute 1/J to avoid divisions.

title: precompute inverse Jacobian

body:
This PR
 - Bumps the patch version for a new release
 - Adds compat bounds to the perf environment
 - Removes more windows tests. Here is a [gist](https://gist.github.com/charleskawczynski/da8c036dff25c9094c2d3e1c5e106f65) of the stack trace issue.
 - Increases memory request for unit tests
title: Bump patch version for new release
